rationale: Rebuilt det.rs with surrounding type definitions (the original file was just the det fragment, missing the verus! wrapper and KeyTrait/VerusClone/StrictlyOrderedVec definitions, so it failed to parse). Simplified StrictlyOrderedVec to wrap a Seq<K> directly so structural equality reduces to Seq extensional equality (Vec lacks extensionality axioms in vstd). Proof block asserts the implication (postcondition-LHS ==> det_erase_equal) with a `by` block that case-splits on post1@==post2@ and uses =~= to lift Seq extensionality to struct equality.
